scripts.dev: bun run link:wosm && bun run repair:node-pty && bun --hot src/main.tsx
scripts.station: bun run link:wosm && bun run repair:node-pty && bun src/main.tsx
scripts.test:agents: bun run repair:node-pty && WOSM_STATION_PTY_SMOKE=1 WOSM_STATION_PTY_SMOKE_TUI=1 bun test src/input/stationInput.e2e.test.tsx src/terminal/ptyPipeline.smoke.test.ts
scripts.test:pty: bun run repair:node-pty && WOSM_STATION_PTY_SMOKE=1 bun test src/terminal/pty/nodePtyTerminal.test.ts src/terminal/ptyPipeline.smoke.test.ts src/terminal/pty/bridgeHardening.test.ts src/input/stationInput.e2e.test.tsx
